## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / formatting fix (no review process required)
- [ ] Clarification of existing spec language
- [ ] New field or extension to an existing spec
- [ ] New document or specification
- [ ] Schema change
- [ ] Governance or process change
- [ ] Principle change (requires exceptional justification)

## Principles alignment

<!-- How does this change align with the HALOS Principles? If it departs from a principle, explain why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] This change is appropriately scoped
- [ ] If this changes a schema, I have updated examples to remain valid
- [ ] If this is a new spec document, it references the correct schema
- [ ] I understand this will be licensed under CC-BY-4.0
